headings: THE SIGNATORIES HERETO REPRESENT THAT THEY HAVE READ THIS SUBCONTRACT CAREFULLY  AND  FULLY  UNDERSTAND  AND  AGREE  TO  EACH  AND  EVERY  PROVISION CONTAINED HEREIN.
text: IN  WITNESS  WHEREOF,  the  parties  hereto  have  executed  this  agreement  for  themselves,  their  heirs, executors, successors, administrators and assigns, on the day and year first above written.
